object_a.label: door
object_a.description: glass sliding/French style door with grid panes
object_a.long_form_open_description: A full-height glass door with a white muntin/grid pattern creating multiple small panes. The door sits in a white-painted frame and opens to the exterior; glass is clear with some glare from outside. Door threshold and lower trim visible at floor level.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: immediately right of the vertical blinds and left of the beige wall with picture frame
